round9_fixes.checkpoint_resume_sc_baseline: Added per-sample incremental JSONL checkpoint/resume to run_gsm8k_sc_baseline.py (was in-memory only); loads done_indices on startup, skips completed samples, appends each result to incremental file
round9_fixes.checkpoint_resume_policy_search: Added per-sample incremental JSONL checkpoint/resume to run_gsm8k_policy_search.py for both train and test phases; loads done_indices on startup, skips completed samples, appends each result to incremental file
round9_fixes.stale_path_cleanup_10_files: Replaced all 'methods/01_adathink/...' references in 10 scripts with repo-relative paths: run_learned_budget_controller.py (input_csvs default + output_dir), run_template_budget_controller.py (input_csvs default + output paths), run_parametric_budget_controller.py (output paths), run_8b_think_postprocess_after_seeds.py (base_manifest + results_dir + 3 subprocess script paths), run_overthinking_aggregate.py (output path), run_value_budget_controller.py (output paths), run_parametric_sweep.py (result_dir + 2 subprocess script paths), compute_utility_cis.py (/workspace hard-coded paths)
round9_fixes.run_full_pipeline_fixes: Removed hardcoded /workspace/models/hf_cache; made HF_HOME use setdefault to respect env; implemented run_significance() stub with actual subprocess call; fixed docstring
round9_fixes.run_acp_fail_fast: Replaced || true in run_acp.sh phases 3/4/6/7 with proper failure tracking and conditional mark_phase_done (same pattern as run_all_experiments.sh)
round9_fixes.setup_sh_robust_python: Added cascading Python version detection (3.10 -> 3.11 -> 3.12 -> system -> python3 -m venv fallback) to setup.sh instead of hard-failing on missing Python 3.10
round9_fixes.syntax_verification: All 12 modified Python scripts pass py_compile; all 5 modified shell scripts pass bash -n

round8_fixes.run_all_experiments_error_handling: Replaced || true with failure tracking; mark_phase_done only on success
round8_fixes.stale_path_fixes: Changed default results_dir from methods/01_adathink/results to results in 3 scripts; fixed hardcoded script path in run_parametric_from_manifest.py
round8_fixes.find_existing_result_wired: Connected find_existing_result() to run_experiment() in run_full_pipeline.py
